title: PhD Program in Health Management Application and Fees
content:
PhD Program in Health Management Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester Online Application Opening Date: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 18, 2026

SCIENCE EXAM:

Date: Thursday, January 22, 2026

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

ALES Score Type:

EQUAL WEIGHT (EA)

Science exam will be held in Doctorate Programs;

The candidates will receive 50% of the ALES score in the relevant score type, 30% of the science exam, and 20% of the undergraduate (and/or) graduate grade point average.

– Original or certified copy of Master's diploma

-Original or certified copy of Master's transcript (transcript)

-ALES exam result document

-Copy of identity card

-Photo (2 Pieces)

Click to Download Foreign Language Exams Equivalency Document

SPECIAL CONDITIONS FOR CANDIDATES

- The applications of the candidates who registered to the Master's Program before 06 February 2013 will be accepted without distinction between thesis and non-thesis.

-Only those who have graduated from the Master's program with thesis will be accepted to the PhD program, among the candidates who enroll in the Master's Program after February 2013.

-To have a score of 55 or more in YDS and an equivalent exam.

- Graduate graduation grade point averages must be at least 2.5 out of 4 coefficients.

- Master's Degree from one of the fields of Health Management (or equivalent names), Hospital Management (and equivalent names), Management Organization, Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Public Administration, Quality Management, Public Health, Nursing Management, Social Work, Health Law, Health Economics have a diploma

-Medicine, Dentistry and Pharmacy Bachelor's graduates can apply directly if they meet the requirements of ALES and YDS by taking some courses from the Scientific Preparation program, without requiring a Master's degree.

55 points from the Equal Weight point type.

-Applicants will be selected in order of success.

TUITION FEE:
